'''Gavron Sil''' was the son of [[Drex]] and the brother of [[Feleen Bantillian]]. He was killed by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. His father and brother conspired to take revenge on Fett, but their plot was unsuccessful and they soon met the same fate as Sil.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|18|Payback (comic story)}} {{1stm}}
